text: It feels eerie and disorienting to be here. The space is dark and empty, filled with angles and reflective surfaces that distort my sense of direction. The silence amplifies my thoughts, making me reflect on the nature of emptiness—how absence can sometimes weigh heavier than presence. The suggestion of research and development on the wall reminds me that even in darkness, there is potential for new ideas, but at this moment, I feel isolated in anticipation.
